hero.title: Nutritional support for lasting results
hero.description: Take care of your recovery with personalized nutritional follow-up, practical assessments, clear recommendations and interventions that track your progress safely.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to continue your post-surgery care

1.title: Sign up quickly
1.description: Create your account and get immediate access to specialized nutritional support.

2.title: Choose the right nutritionist
2.description: See professionals approved for post-bariatric care and select who matches your case.

3.title: Receive continuous support
3.description: Track your progress with personalized adjustments and practical monthly guidance.

4.title: Access results
4.description: Control your meal plan, goals and feedback in a single platform.

nutritionistsSection.title: Approved nutritionists
nutritionistsSection.description: Choose from experienced professionals and update your post-op plan with personalized care and continuous support.
nutritionistsSection.emptyDesc: We are approving new professionals to expand care and offer more support for your post-op.

footer.description: Post-bariatric nutritional follow-up for international patients. We connect you to continuity of care when you return home.
footer.note: Nutribar is a nutritional follow-up platform and does not replace in-person medical guidance.
